title: Revoked tokens remain authorized to seal data and mint trusted provenance in the WSF API composition

affected_locations.label: broken_control
affected_locations.detail: optional revocation control defaults to allow

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: Transit and service signer mint envelope

evidence: same default revocation path as RWC-002
seal independently reaches OpenBao transit_encrypt and seal_envelope at wsf-seal/src/lib.rs:328-360
proof_gap: Dynamic OpenBao-backed exploit was not run; code path and deployed composition are complete.

facts: attacker retains unexpired signed token after revocation
no current revocation store is configured
seal consumes custody and signing authority
